introParagraph1: Exceptional hardship means experiencing serious difficulties that go beyond the normal difficulty of losing your home.
introParagraph2: Any details you provide will be considered by a judge. If  they decide that exceptional hardship applies in your case, they might consider whether you can stay in your home for longer.
bullet1: gone through a divorce or separation
bullet2: lost your job or been made redundant
bullet3: experienced a bereavement or long-term illness
question: Would you experience exceptional hardship if you were asked to leave your home?
textAreaLabel: Give details about the exceptional hardship you’d experience

errors.exceptionalHardship: Select if you’d experience exceptional hardship if you were asked to leave your home
errors.exceptionalHardshipDetails: Give details about the exceptional hardship you’d experience
errors.exceptionalHardshipDetailsInvalidCharact: The details of the exceptional hardship you’d experience must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
